# Folio3 — Microsoft Azure Services & Solutions

> Folio3 is a Microsoft Solutions Partner delivering Microsoft Azure cloud, data
> & analytics (Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, Power Platform), and AI/Copilot
> solutions — including ready-to-deploy conversational AI agents — for enterprises.

This file lists the key pages on azure.folio3.com in a clean, curated form for AI
assistants and LLMs. Each link points to a page describing a Folio3 Azure service,
solution, industry offering, or customer story.

## Company

- [Services Overview](https://azure.folio3.com/services/): The full range of Folio3's Microsoft Azure services.
- [About Us](https://azure.folio3.com/about-us/): Folio3's Azure practice, Microsoft partnerships, and expertise.
- [Contact Us](https://azure.folio3.com/contact-us/): Request a consultation or product demo.

## Cloud & Managed Services

- [Azure Cloud Services](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-cloud-service/): Azure migration, architecture, and cloud enablement.
- [Azure Managed Services](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-managed-services/): Ongoing monitoring, VM management, backup, and cost optimization.
- [Microsoft Licensing](https://azure.folio3.com/microsoft-licensing-process/): Guidance on the Microsoft and Azure licensing process.

## Data, Analytics & Business Intelligence

- [Azure Data Analytics](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-data-analytics/): End-to-end data analytics on Microsoft Azure.
- [Agriculture Data Analytics](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-data-analytics/agriculture-data-analytics/): Analytics solutions for agriculture.
- [Manufacturing Data Analytics](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-data-analytics/manufacturing-data-analytics/): Analytics for manufacturing operations.
- [Retail Analytics](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-data-analytics/retail-analytics/): Real-time retail performance dashboards.
- [Supply Chain Analytics](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-data-analytics/supply-chain-analytics/): Analytics to optimize the supply chain.
- [Data Visualization as a Service](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-data-analytics/data-visualization-as-a-service/): Managed dashboards and visualization.
- [Power BI Services](https://azure.folio3.com/power-bi-services/): Microsoft-certified Power BI business intelligence services.
- [Microsoft Fabric Services](https://azure.folio3.com/microsoft-fabric-services/): Unified analytics on Microsoft Fabric.
- [Microsoft Fabric Migration](https://azure.folio3.com/microsoft-fabric-services/microsoft-fabric-migration/): Migrating enterprise data to Microsoft Fabric.
- [Microsoft Power Platform](https://azure.folio3.com/microsoft-power-platform-services/): Power Apps, Power Automate, and low-code automation.
- [Data Integration as a Service](https://azure.folio3.com/data-integration-as-a-service/): ETL/ELT pipelines to unify enterprise data.
- [Data Warehousing as a Service](https://azure.folio3.com/data-warehousing-as-a-service/): Managed cloud data warehousing.
- [Automated Data Reporting](https://azure.folio3.com/automated-data-reporting/): Automated, high-accuracy reporting solutions.
- [Data Science & AI](https://azure.folio3.com/data-science-ai/): Predictive analytics and machine-learning models on Azure.
- [IntelliFabric Analytics](https://azure.folio3.com/solution/intellifabric/): Self-service reporting solution built on Microsoft Fabric.

## AI, Copilot & Agents

- [AI-Powered Solutions](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-powered-solutions/): Azure AI and Microsoft Copilot solutions overview.
- [Recruit Flow — Copilot for Recruitment](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-powered-solutions/copilot-for-recruitment/): AI agent that simplifies recruitment.
- [AI Agents](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-agents/): Ready-to-deploy conversational AI agents.
- [IT Asset Management Copilot](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-agents/it-asset-management-agent/): Conversational IT asset management (ITAM).
- [KubeMonitor Copilot](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-agents/kubemonitor-agent/): Conversational Kubernetes observability.
- [SmartExpense Copilot](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-agents/smartexpense-agent/): AI agent for expense management.
- [Zammad Ticketing Copilot](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-agents/ai-powered-ticketing-and-customer-service-agent/): AI for automated ticketing and customer service.
- [Microsoft Copilot Consulting](https://azure.folio3.com/data-science-ai/microsoft-copilot-consulting/): Strategic Microsoft Copilot adoption services.
- [Copilot Scenario Library](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-scenario-library/): Library of Copilot agent use-cases by function.
- [Copilot in Retail](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-scenario-library/copilot-in-retail/): AI-powered supply-chain agents for retail.
- [Copilot for Finance](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-scenario-library/finance/): Azure AI Copilot scenarios for finance.
- [Copilot for Human Resources](https://azure.folio3.com/ai-scenario-library/human-resources/): Azure AI Copilot scenarios for HR.

## Industries

- [Azure for Healthcare](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-for-healthcare/): Azure solutions for healthcare.
- [Azure for Retail](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-for-retail/): Azure solutions for retail.
- [Azure for Manufacturing](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-for-manufacturing/): Azure solutions for manufacturing.
- [Azure for Logistics & Transport](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-for-logistics-and-transport/): Azure logistics and transport solutions.
- [Azure for Construction](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-for-construction/): Azure solutions for construction.

## Customer Stories

- [Client Case Studies](https://azure.folio3.com/case-studies/): Index of Folio3 Azure customer success stories.
- [City University on Azure](https://azure.folio3.com/city-university-azure/): Education case study.
- [Savills — Microsoft Fabric Reporting](https://azure.folio3.com/microsoft-fabric-reporting-for-real-estate/): Real-estate reporting boosted efficiency by 13%.
- [Alibaba — Power BI Financial Reporting](https://azure.folio3.com/power-bi-financial-reporting-for-alibaba/): 37% faster financial closings with Power BI.
- [SLB — Automated Data Reporting](https://azure.folio3.com/azure-automated-data-reporting-for-slb/): 99.9% data accuracy in automated reporting.
- [Copilot Studio HR Policy Agent](https://azure.folio3.com/case-studies/microsoft-copilot-studio-based-hr-policy-agent/): HR policy agent built on Microsoft Copilot Studio.
- [Food Planning Copilot](https://azure.folio3.com/copilot-implementation-food-verification/): Copilot cut food-plan creation time by 60%.
- [Power BI for Farm Efficiency](https://azure.folio3.com/implementing-power-bi-dashboard-for-food-crop-grower/): Power BI dashboards improved farm operations.
